response.overview: Spider-Noir follows Ben Reilly (Nicolas Cage), a weary, down-on-his-luck private investigator in 1930s New York. Once the city's only superhero known as "The Spider," Reilly tries to leave his masked past behind after a personal tragedy. His attempt to stay retired is derailed when a struggling case plunges him into a dangerous underworld run by the notorious mob boss Silvermane, forcing him to don the mask again
response.title: Spider-Noir
